results.title: Meta to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results
results.description: MENLO PARK, Calif., July 14, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) announced today that the company's second quarter 2026 financial results will be released after market close on Wednesday, July 29th, 2026. Meta will host a conference call to discuss its results at 1:30...

results.title: HOKA brought back its beloved Huaka Pro sneaker for some rare Y2K nostalgia
results.description: Let's kick it back to 2000 with this Y2K-inspired re-release of the HOKA Huaka Pro sneaker. It's back and badder than ever — but it won't be here for long.

results.title: Trump administration orders ICE to suspend most vehicle stops after two deadly shootings
results.description: Trump administration officials have told Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers to suspend most vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in little over a week, according to a person familiar with the matter. The order Tuesday came a day after an...

results.title: Trump's recent comment on a "normal path" for CNN raised eyebrows amid the Paramount-WBD merger; Paramount would need CNN revenue to help pay off $80B in debt (Alex Weprin/The Hollywood Reporter)
results.description: Alex Weprin / The Hollywood Reporter : Trump's recent comment on a “normal path” for CNN raised eyebrows amid the Paramount-WBD merger; Paramount would need CNN revenue to help pay off $80B in debt — The cable news channel may not be the ratings juggernaut it once was, but it matters to President Trump ...
